description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls. The house is set on a rectangular lot with a paved driveway leading to a car parked at the side. A spacious wooden deck extends from the rear, surrounding a rectangular swimming pool and furnished with lounge chairs, an umbrella, and outdoor seating. Tall palm trees and decorative landscaping, including a purple-leaved tree and a white-flowering tree, enhance the outdoor area. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the rear facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, large windows, and a backyard deck with a pool and palm trees.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the black facade, main entry, driveway with a car, and the backyard deck with pool and palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the white exterior, paved driveway, and the side of the wooden deck with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Left-side view focusing on the white wall, upper story, and the pool area with palm trees and outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Back view showcasing the large glass windows, wooden deck, pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and lush landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, and no porch, integrated into the black facade adjacent to the driveway.
